use std::ffi::CString;

fn open_file(path: &str) -> i32 {
    let c_path = CString::new(path).unwrap();
    unsafe { libc::open(c_path.as_ptr(), libc::O_RDONLY | libc::O_CLOEXEC) }
}

fn create_file(path: &str) -> i32 {
    let c_path = CString::new(path).unwrap();
    unsafe {
        libc::open(c_path.as_ptr(), libc::O_CREAT | libc::O_WRONLY | libc::O_CLOEXEC, 0o644)
    }
}
